method: Prices from Inceptron's own public OpenAI-compatible catalog API https://api.inceptron.io/v1/models (no auth; pricing.prompt / pricing.completion in USD per token x 1e6; input_cache_reads for cache tier), cross-checked against OpenRouter endpoint data (provider_name=='Inceptron'). The public API now lists 4 priced text LLMs (was 6 on 2026-06-23). All 4 in/out prices agree exactly between api.inceptron.io and OpenRouter. Change vs prior snapshot: GLM 5.1 (was 1.40/3.74) and Kimi K2.6 Fast (was 1.32/7.00) were both delisted from the native API and no longer have an Inceptron OpenRouter endpoint, so they are dropped. GLM 5.2 is now 1.15/3.62 (was 1.16/3.62 earlier; input has settled at 1.15). Kimi K2.7 Code 0.85/3.50, Kimi K2.6 0.66/3.41, MiniMax M2.5 0.15/0.90 all unchanged from 2026-06-23. HQ Sweden (SE), datacenters Finland (FI) per OpenRouter provider metadata.

models.notes: fp4 quant, 1.05M context. Cache read $0.21/1M. Inceptron model id zai-org/GLM-5.2. Verified live api.inceptron.io + OpenRouter Inceptron endpoint 2026-07-01: in $1.15 / out $3.62. Unchanged output vs 2026-06-23; input settled at 1.15.

int4 quant, 262K context, multimodal (text+image input). Cache read $0.18/1M. Inceptron model id moonshotai/Kimi-K2.7-Code. Matches OpenRouter Inceptron endpoint (in 0.85 / out 3.50). Unchanged vs 2026-06-23.

int4 quant, 262K context, multimodal (text+image input). Cache read $0.14/1M. Inceptron model id moonshotai/Kimi-K2.6. Matches OpenRouter Inceptron endpoint (in 0.66 / out 3.41). Unchanged vs 2026-06-23.
fp8 quant, 196K context. Cache read $0.05/1M. Inceptron model id MiniMaxAI/MiniMax-M2.5. Matches OpenRouter Inceptron endpoint (in 0.15 / out 0.90). Unchanged vs 2026-06-23.
